meaning: adj.从前的,以前的n.形成者,创造者,模型,样板
examples: The former option would be much more sensible.
Her article showed no charity towards her former friends.
One former director embezzled $34 million in company funds.
The former Marks and Spencer chairman says he started out selling pyjamas at the retail giant.
Banker and former Finance Minister Mikhail Zadornov praised Kozlov for his dedication and spotless reputation.
